name: fishcake-monorepo
description: Fishcake dApp Tool - CLI and Web applications for fishcake.io on Polygon Mainnet

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:cli && npm run build:web
scripts.clean: npm run clean:backend && npm run clean:cli
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../CLI-App && npm install && cd ../Web-App && npm install
scripts.test:no-backend: echo 'Testing apps without backend...' && npm run test:cli-no-backend && npm run test:web-no-backend
scripts.test:cli-no-backend: cd CLI-App && node -e "import('@fishcake/backend').catch(e => { console.log('✓ CLI correctly fails without backend'); process.exit(0); })"
scripts.test:web-no-backend: cd Web-App && node -e "import('@fishcake/backend').catch(e => { console.log('✓ Web correctly fails without backend'); process.exit(0); })"
